name: The World of Indubala
overview: From being a little girl in rural Bangladesh to being an entrepreneur in Kolkata, Indubala's journey is laced with the desolation of separation from her roots and the consolation of every taste being a memory of someone she has lost.

trailers.title: Trailer - Indubala Bhaater Hotel (ইন্দুবালা ভাতের হোটেল) | Subhashree Ganguly | 8th March | hoichoi
